nasb.text: Return to the stronghold, O prisoners who have the hope; This very day I am declaring that I will restore double to you.

esv.text: Return to your stronghold, O prisoners of hope; today I declare that I will restore to you double.

cnv.text: 你們被囚仍有盼望的人哪！要歸回保障。 今天我要宣告：我必加倍補償給你。

ccb.text: 有盼望的被掳者啊，回到你们的堡垒吧。 今日我宣布，我必加倍地补偿你们。
